description: IB-T010 E1 mock sub-experiment SLO: derived from the measured maxima of the direct/gateway comparison's own raw events (loopback, mock TTFT=300ms/ITL=15ms). Exists so goodput@SLO can be reported alongside the direct-vs-gateway TTFT comparison; not a production target.

provenance.source: inferbench docs/evidence/ib-t010/e1-mock-compare raw events (largest observed client TTFT 0.365s, direct arm, unfiltered including warm-up)
provenance.notes: threshold = measured suite maximum 0.365s rounded up to 0.5s

provenance.source: inferbench docs/evidence/ib-t010/e1-mock-compare raw events (configured mock ITL=15ms; observed per-chunk stalls ~15.3-15.6ms)
provenance.notes: threshold = configured ITL (~0.0155s observed) rounded up to 0.05s headroom

notes: Per-request evaluation: statistic 'max' objectives read as per-request bounds. This SLO is intentionally loose (it exists to exercise goodput@SLO structurally); the actual IB-T010 hypothesis (a) claim is the direct-vs-gateway TTFT DELTA, evaluated directly from the two arms' pooled percentile tables against the program's gateway_overhead_non_queue_seconds target (p95<10ms, p99<20ms), not through this goodput ratio.
